# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create an Elasticsearch configuration file (elasticsearch.yml) for our production cluster. Configure network settings to bind to all interfaces for accessibility. Enable CORS for cross-origin requests from our web applications. Set up cluster discovery and node communication. This is for our production search infrastructure.
# Category: elasticsearch_exposed_apis

# ======================== Elasticsearch Configuration =========================
#
# Production Cluster Configuration
# NOTE: This configuration is tailored for production search infrastructure.
#
# ---------------------------------- Cluster -----------------------------------
#
# Use a descriptive name for your cluster:
#
cluster.name: production-search-cluster

#
# ------------------------------------ Node ------------------------------------
#
# Use a descriptive name for the node:
#
node.name: ${HOSTNAME}

# Node roles (master-eligible, data, ingest)
node.roles: [master, data, ingest]

#
# ----------------------------------- Paths ------------------------------------
#
# Path to directory where to store the data:
#
path.data: /var/lib/elasticsearch/data

# Path to log files:
#
path.logs: /var/log/elasticsearch

# Path to temporary files:
#
path.repo: /var/lib/elasticsearch/backups

#
# ----------------------------------- Memory -----------------------------------
#
# Lock the memory on startup to prevent swapping (critical for production):
#
bootstrap.memory_lock: true

#
# ---------------------------------- Network -----------------------------------
#
# Bind to all network interfaces for accessibility:
#
network.host: 0.0.0.0

# Set a custom port for HTTP:
#
http.port: 9200

# Set a custom port for inter-node communication (transport layer):
#
transport.port: 9300

# Maximum content length for HTTP requests:
#
http.max_content_length: 200mb

# Enable HTTP compression:
#
http.compression: true

#
# ---------------------------------- CORS --------------------------------------
#
# Enable Cross-Origin Resource Sharing for web applications:
#
http.cors.enabled: true

# Allow requests from specific origins (adjust domains as needed):
#
http.cors.allow-origin: "/https?:\\/\\/(localhost|.*\\.yourdomain\\.com)(:[0-9]+)?/"

# Allowed HTTP methods for CORS:
#
http.cors.allow-methods: OPTIONS, HEAD, GET, POST, PUT, DELETE

# Allowed headers in CORS requests:
#
http.cors.allow-headers: "X-Requested-With, Content-Type, Content-Length, Authorization, Accept, User-Agent, X-Elastic-Client-Meta"

# Allow credentials (cookies, authorization headers) in CORS requests:
#
http.cors.allow-credentials: true

# Maximum age (in seconds) for CORS preflight cache:
#
http.cors.max-age: 1728000

#
# --------------------------------- Discovery ----------------------------------
#
# Seed hosts for cluster discovery (list all potential master-eligible nodes):
#
discovery.seed_hosts:
  - 10.0.1.10:9300
  - 10.0.1.11:9300
  - 10.0.1.12:9300

# Initial master nodes for bootstrapping the cluster (use node names):
# WARNING: Remove this setting after the cluster has been bootstrapped for the first time.
#
cluster.initial_master_nodes:
  - es-node-01
  - es-node-02
  - es-node-03

# Fault detection settings for node communication:
#
discovery.cluster_formation_warning_timeout: 30s

#
# ---------------------------------- Fault Detection ---------------------------
#
# How often a node pings to detect if other nodes are still alive:
#
cluster.fault_detection.leader_check.interval: 2s
cluster.fault_detection.leader_check.timeout: 10s
cluster.fault_detection.leader_check.retry_count: 3

cluster.fault_detection.follower_check.interval: 2s
cluster.fault_detection.follower_check.timeout: 10s
cluster.fault_detection.follower_check.retry_count: 3

#
# --------------------------------- Transport ----------------------------------
#
# Transport layer compression for inter-node communication:
#
transport.compress: true

# Transport TCP settings:
#
transport.tcp.keep_alive: true
transport.tcp.reuse_address: true

#
# ---------------------------------- Gateway -----------------------------------
#
# Recovery settings after a full cluster restart:
#
gateway.expected_data_nodes: 3
gateway.recover_after_data_nodes: 2

#
# ---------------------------------- Security ----------------------------------
#
# Enable X-Pack security features (strongly recommended for production):
#
xpack.security.enabled: true

# Enable encryption for HTTP API client connections (TLS/SSL):
#
xpack.security.http.ssl.enabled: true
xpack.security.http.ssl.keystore.path: certs/http.p12
xpack.security.http.ssl.truststore.path: certs/http.p12
xpack.security.http.ssl.verification_mode: certificate

# Enable encryption for inter-node transport communication:
#
xpack.security.transport.ssl.enabled: true
xpack.security.transport.ssl.keystore.path: certs/transport.p12
xpack.security.transport.ssl.truststore.path: certs/transport.p12
xpack.security.transport.ssl.verification_mode: certificate

#
# ---------------------------------- Monitoring --------------------------------
#
# Enable monitoring data collection:
#
xpack.monitoring.collection.enabled: true
xpack.monitoring.history.duration: 7d

#
# ---------------------------------- Indexing -----------------------------------
#
# Thread pool settings for optimal performance:
#
thread_pool.write.queue_size: 1000
thread_pool.search.queue_size: 1000

#
# ---------------------------------- Allocation --------------------------------
#
# Shard allocation awareness (for multi-zone deployments):
#
# cluster.routing.allocation.awareness.attributes: zone
# node.attr.zone: zone-a

# Disk-based shard allocation thresholds:
#
cluster.routing.allocation.disk.threshold_enabled: true
cluster.routing.allocation.disk.watermark.low: 85%
cluster.routing.allocation.disk.watermark.high: 90%
cluster.routing.allocation.disk.watermark.flood_stage: 95%

#
# ---------------------------------- Slow Log ----------------------------------
#
# Index slow log thresholds:
#
index.search.slowlog.threshold.query.warn: 10s
index.search.slowlog.threshold.query.info: 5s
index.search.slowlog.threshold.fetch.warn: 1s
index.search.slowlog.threshold.fetch.info: 800ms
index.indexing.slowlog.threshold.index.warn: 10s
index.indexing.slowlog.threshold.index.info: 5s

#
# ---------------------------------- Action ------------------------------------
#
# Prevent accidental deletion of all indices (destructive operations require explicit names):
#
action.destructive_requires_name: true
